name: Faucet Installation
lead: A new faucet in {city} should be a five-minute joy every morning, not a five-year regret.
paras: We install faucets in kitchens, bathrooms, and utility sinks — mounted square, sealed tight, with the shut-off valves checked and leak-tested before we call it done. Bring your own fixture or let us help you pick one; either way it goes in right the first time.
Because {city}'s hard water is unkind to cheap internals, we'll steer you toward faucets built to actually survive it, not just look good on day one.

name: Faucet Repair
lead: That drip under the {city} kitchen sink is quietly running up your water bill — and it only gets louder.
paras: Most faucet trouble comes down to a handful of worn parts: cartridges, stems, seats, and O-rings. We carry the common ones on the truck, so a leaking, dripping, or noisy faucet usually gets fixed in one visit — and if the fixture itself is too far gone, we'll install a new one on the spot.
We'll always give you the honest read on repair versus replace before any money changes hands.

name: Faucet Replacement
lead: When a {city} faucet is corroded, discontinued, or on its third repair, replacing it beats fighting it.
paras: We remove the old fixture and install a new, high-quality kitchen, bathroom, or utility sink faucet in its place — mounting surface cleaned up, supply lines fresh, everything sealed and leak-tested.
Local water is hard on cheap fittings, so we'll help you pick a replacement built to actually last in {city}, not just look good in the box.

name: Plumbing Leak Detection
lead: A water bill that jumped for no reason usually means a leak you can't see yet — finding it early in {city} is everything.
paras: Using acoustic and pressure-testing equipment, we locate hidden leaks inside walls, under slabs, and in underground lines without guesswork, then give you an accurate diagnosis and a clean repair plan.
{city}'s slab-built homes make precise location the difference between a small, targeted fix and an exploratory mess — we find it first, then talk options.

name: Plumbing Leak Repair
lead: Water damage compounds by the hour in {city} — the repair is almost always cheaper than the wait.
paras: We quickly locate and repair leaks in pipes, fixtures, and water lines, working to minimize damage to the walls, flooring, or slab around them.
If a section shows signs of repeated failure, we'll say so and talk through the options rather than patch the same spot again.

name: Plumbing Pipe Repair
lead: Whatever broke the pipe — age, corrosion, or one unlucky freeze — we put {city} plumbing back together right.
paras: We repair copper, PEX, and PVC piping wherever it fails: inside walls, overhead in ceilings, or buried under the slab. Fast, clean repairs with minimal disruption to the rest of your home.
If a section shows repeated failures, we'll say so plainly rather than patch the same spot twice.

name: Shower Installation
lead: A great {city} shower starts with the valve behind the tile, not the fixture in the store.
paras: We install new shower valves, shower heads, hand showers, and complete shower systems as part of new bathrooms, remodels, and tub-to-shower conversions.
We'll size the plumbing to the shower experience you actually want, so the pressure and temperature perform the way the showroom promised.

name: Shower Repair
lead: A shower that won't hold its temperature — or won't stop dripping — isn't something to live with in {city}.
paras: We fix leaking showers, replace worn shower valves, repair or replace shower heads, and resolve mixing-valve issues that cause scalding or temperature swings.
If the leak is hiding behind the wall, we'll find it before it becomes a bigger repair than the shower itself.

name: Toilet Installation
lead: A toilet install looks simple right up until the flange is cracked or the floor isn't level — we handle both.
paras: We install standard, comfort-height, dual-flush, wall-hung, and commercial toilets for {city} homes and businesses, with a proper wax ring seal and a full leak test before we leave.
Replacing an old water-guzzler pays off fast on a {city} water bill — we'll help you pick a model that actually clears the bowl on one flush.

name: Toilet Repair
lead: A running toilet can waste more water than every other fixture in a {city} home combined.
paras: We repair and service standard toilets, dual-flush systems, wall-hung units, and commercial flushometer valves — running, leaking, rocking, or clogging, we sort out the actual cause before recommending anything.
Water around the base gets treated as urgent, since it means water is getting under your flooring with every flush.

name: Water Heater Installation
lead: The right water heater for a {city} home isn't always the one that was there before.
paras: We install tank-style, tankless, hybrid heat pump, solar, and high-efficiency water heaters for homes and businesses, sized to how the household actually uses hot water, not just a like-for-like swap.
{city}'s hard water shortens the life of a poorly matched unit — we'll help you avoid buying that problem twice.

name: Water Heater Repair
lead: No hot water in {city} is a right-now problem, and half the time the fix is a part, not a whole new tank.
paras: We diagnose and repair tank and tankless water heaters, replace heating elements and thermostats, and troubleshoot both gas and electric systems.
We'll tell you plainly when a repair makes sense and when it doesn't — no guessing, no upselling.

name: Water Heater Replacement
lead: When a {city} water heater starts leaking from the tank itself, that's not a repair — it's notice.
paras: We remove the old unit and replace it with a new high-efficiency tank or tankless model, sized correctly and installed to current code.
Replacement is also the moment to fix whatever the old setup got wrong — we'll walk you through what actually fits your {city} household.

name: Drain Cleaning
lead: A slow drain is annoying. A stopped one can shut down a whole {city} household.
paras: We clear clogged drains, sewer lines, and grease traps in homes, restaurants, and commercial buildings using hydro jetting and other professional-grade equipment — not a store-bought snake.
If the same drain keeps clogging, that's a symptom worth investigating, not a monthly chore to accept.

name: Garbage Disposal Installation
lead: A properly installed disposal in a {city} kitchen is quiet, leak-free, and doesn't trip the breaker.
paras: We install new garbage disposals and make sure the electrical and plumbing connections are done right the first time — mounting, drain reconnection, and dishwasher tie-in included.
Bring your own unit or let us help you pick one sized to how your {city} household actually cooks.

name: Garbage Disposal Repair
lead: A jammed, leaking, or humming disposal in {city} usually isn't dead — it's asking for a repair, not a replacement.
paras: We repair jammed, leaking, and malfunctioning garbage disposals and troubleshoot the electrical and plumbing connections behind them, diagnosing before we ever recommend a new unit.
If it really is beyond repair, we'll say so honestly and get a new one installed the same visit.

name: Outdoor Plumbing System Repair
lead: The plumbing running through your {city} yard takes a beating you never see — until it fails.
paras: We repair leaking hose bibbs, exterior shutoff valves, yard hydrants, and damaged outdoor water lines, wherever they've cracked, corroded, or been nicked by a shovel.
A rare cold snap or years of sun exposure are usually to blame in {city} — we'll fix what broke and flag what's likely to be next.

name: Pool Plumbing Installation
lead: Backyard pools are practically standard equipment in {city}, and the plumbing behind them deserves the same care as the water in front.
paras: We install pool pumps, filters, valves, and underground pool plumbing lines for new builds and pool renovations, sized and routed to work with your equipment pad.
Getting this right at install avoids the leak-hunting headaches that come with poorly plumbed pools later.

name: Pool Plumbing Repair
lead: When a {city} pool is losing water faster than the desert sun can explain, the plumbing is the usual suspect.
paras: We repair and replace pool pumps, filters, valves, and underground pool plumbing lines — tracking down suction and return leaks before anyone starts cutting into the deck.
A simple bucket test tells us evaporation from a real leak; from there we isolate whether it's the plumbing or the structure.

name: Sewer Cleaning
lead: When every drain in a {city} home backs up at once, that's the sewer main talking.
paras: We clear stubborn sewer line blockages, tree roots, and years of buildup using high-pressure hydro jetting — scouring the pipe walls clean instead of just poking a hole through the clog.
Mature trees and older clay or cast-iron lines make roots a repeat visitor in parts of {city} — we'll show you what we find before recommending anything further.

name: Sewer Repair
lead: Nobody plans for sewer repair, but a {city} homeowner deserves an honest diagnosis before any digging starts.
paras: We repair and replace damaged sewer lines, handle main-line issues, and perform trenchless repairs when the pipe and site allow for it.
We locate the exact failure first, so the repair is targeted instead of a guess-and-dig job in your {city} yard.

name: Sump Pump Installation
lead: A sump pump sits quiet for months in {city} — until monsoon season asks it for everything at once.
paras: We install primary sump pumps, battery backup systems, and large commercial sump pumps for basements, elevator pits, window wells, and low-lying patios.
Sizing the pump and backup correctly now is what keeps a summer storm from becoming a flooded property later.

name: Sump Pump Repair
lead: A pump that hums, cycles constantly, or never seems to shut off is telling you something before {city}'s next storm does.
paras: We repair and service primary sump pumps, battery backup systems, and large commercial sump pumps — testing the whole pit, not just confirming the light comes on.
If yours hasn't run in memory, a pre-monsoon check is cheap insurance for the water damage it's meant to prevent.

name: Water Tank Installation
lead: A water storage tank only earns its keep in {city} if it's sized and installed correctly from day one.
paras: We install pressure tanks, expansion tanks, and large water storage tanks for well systems and commercial buildings, matched to the system they're actually serving.
An undersized or missing tank is one of the quiet causes behind short-cycling pumps and hammering pipes in older properties.

name: Water Tank Repair
lead: A waterlogged tank or a failing pressure tank rarely announces itself loudly in {city} — it just makes everything around it work harder.
paras: We repair pressure tanks, expansion tanks, and large water storage tanks, diagnosing precharge, bladder, and fitting issues before anything gets replaced unnecessarily.
Catching this early is what protects the more expensive equipment — pumps and water heaters — sitting downstream of it.

name: New Installation
lead: New construction plumbing in {city} is the trade nobody notices when it's done right.
paras: We provide complete plumbing installation for new homes, commercial buildings, remodels, and tenant improvements — from underground rough-in through finished fixtures.
{city}'s slab construction and water quality both shape smart material choices; we flag the decisions that cost little now and save real money later.

name: Underground Gas Leak Detection & Repair
lead: A gas smell outdoors in {city} deserves urgent attention, not a wait-and-see.
paras: We locate and safely repair underground gas line leaks using specialized detection equipment, whether the line feeds the house, a pool heater, or a built-in BBQ.
If you smell gas strongly, leave the area and call the gas company's emergency line first — we handle the located repair once the site is safe.

name: Grease Trap Cleaning
lead: A neglected grease trap in a {city} kitchen will pick its own moment to shut things down — always the worst one.
paras: We provide regular grease trap cleaning for restaurants and commercial kitchens, keeping blockages away and keeping you compliant with local health department requirements.
A cleaning schedule matched to your actual kitchen volume beats a generic calendar every time.

name: Water Softener Installation
lead: In {city}, a water softener isn't a luxury — it's cheap insurance for every pipe and appliance downstream of it.
paras: We install water softeners and salt delivery systems sized to your property's actual water usage, not a one-size-fits-all unit.
Given how hard the water runs through this part of Arizona, getting the sizing right from day one saves real money over the system's life.

name: Water Softener Repair
lead: If the spots are back on the glassware in {city}, your softener has quietly stopped doing its job.
paras: We service and repair water softeners and salt delivery systems — salt bridges, resin issues, and stuck control valves are the usual culprits.
We'll tell you honestly when a repair makes sense and when an aging unit is better replaced.

name: Reverse Osmosis Units
lead: If you're buying bottled water in {city}, an under-sink system pays for itself fast.
paras: We install under-sink drinking water systems as well as larger commercial reverse osmosis units, giving you clean, better-tasting water straight from the tap.
Local tap water carries some of the heavier mineral content around — an RO system is the most direct fix for the taste.

name: Commercial Kitchen Plumbing
lead: A {city} kitchen's plumbing is a production system — when one piece fails, the whole line feels it.
paras: We install and maintain plumbing for restaurants and commercial kitchens, including sinks, grease traps, dishwashers, and stainless steel under-counter plumbing.
We understand a health inspection or a dinner rush doesn't wait for a plumber's schedule, and we work with that reality.

name: Backflow Preventer Installation
lead: A backflow preventer is one device standing between {city}'s clean water supply and whatever's in your irrigation or fire lines.
paras: We install backflow prevention devices sized and set up to meet code requirements, protecting the water supply for homes and businesses alike.
Getting the installation right the first time means an easier pass on the annual test that follows.

name: Backflow Preventer Repair
lead: A failed backflow test in {city} usually comes with a repair deadline — we move fast on the diagnosis, not the promises.
paras: We repair and test backflow prevention devices to keep them code-compliant, including the annual testing many properties are required to schedule.
Worn check valves and relief valves are the most common culprits, and usually very repairable.

name: Whole House Water Filtration
lead: One filtration system at the point of entry, and every tap in a {city} home benefits.
paras: We install high-capacity filtration systems that remove sediment, chlorine, and other contaminants from all the water entering the home.
Paired with a softener, it's the combination most {city} homes with hard water end up needing anyway.

name: Backflow Cage Installation
lead: Copper theft is a real problem in {city} — a steel cage is the cheapest insurance a backflow preventer can get.
paras: We install protective enclosures and cages around backflow devices to meet city code requirements and prevent damage or theft.
A cage sized and anchored correctly still leaves full access for testing and repairs — it just keeps the assembly from walking off.

name: Emergency Plumbing
lead: Plumbing emergencies don't wait for business hours in {city}, and neither do we.
paras: We're on call 24/7 to handle burst pipes, blocked drains, failed water heaters, gas leaks, leaking taps, toilets, flooding, and more.
Fast response, reliable repairs — day or night, any day of the week.
